framework.name: Attenuating Authorization Tokens (AATs)
framework.description: JWT-based credential format where each holder can derive a MORE RESTRICTIVE token offline without contacting the authorization server. Monotonic attenuation enforced cryptographically — scope can only narrow, never widen. Chain verification is offline using only the root trust anchor key.
framework.raw_quote: a holder can attenuate a capability before passing it on, but cannot amplify it... The enforcement point verifies the complete chain using only the root token's trust anchor key; no network calls are required.

source.title: Attenuating Authorization Tokens for Agentic Delegation Chains
